text_raw: The road to our village has been broken for 2 years. Every monsoon it gets worse. Children cannot go to school safely.
हमारे वार्ड में कोई सरकारी स्कूल नहीं है। बच्चों को 7 किलोमीटर दूर जाना पड़ता है।
text_translated: There is no government school in our ward. Children have to go 7 kilometres away.

text_raw: Water supply is very irregular. We get water only twice a week for 30 minutes.
The primary health centre in ward 2 has been closed for 6 months. Pregnant women have to travel 20km.
Power cuts for 8-10 hours daily. Small businesses are suffering. Need reliable electricity.
